subcodes.title: Words to Habib Mu'ayyad, spoken on 1915-05-06
subcodes.first_line: Spiritual teachings are completely consistent with rational thought and science, but it is a question of how they are presented. An interpreter is needed. The same issue can be presented in multiple ways.
subcodes.first_line_orig: مسائل الهیه مطابقت تام با عقل و علم دارد ولی مسئله در بیان شیئی است مبین لازم دارد همان مسئله را میشود بچندین
subcodes.subjects: @wealth inequality and its moderation, @methods of teaching the Cause, @maintainance of degrees in society, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
